scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/icons && cp src/icons/*.png dist/icons/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/icons/icon.svg dist/icons/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/*.html dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/*.css dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp manifest.json dist/
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run watch
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../hime-extension.zip * && cd ..
scripts.release: npm run icons && npm run package
